nasb.text: Behold, I have refined you, but not as silver; I have tested you in the furnace of affliction.

esv.text: Behold, I have refined you, but not as silver; I have tried you in the furnace of affliction.

cnv.text: 看哪！我熬煉了你，卻不像熬煉銀子； 你在苦難的爐中，我揀選了你。

ccb.text: 看啊，我熬炼你，但不像在火炉中炼银子， 我是在苦难的炉中熬炼你。

csbs.text: 看哪！我熬炼你， 不像熬炼银子， 而是在苦难的熔炉中试炼你。
